data.content: Both children completed. b4ce: Added includeAncestorsOfActiveBeats helper to knots-backend.ts, beads-backend.ts, and bd.ts - walks active beat parent chains upward without reintroducing descendant expansion or terminal sibling leakage. 2cc9: Added regression tests for multi-level ancestors in knots-backend, beads-backend, and bd.ts CLI path. All 2208 unit tests pass. Branch: feat/active-ancestor-inclusion (2 commits: d3662ecbe32f, f73403e6).
